reference: Yes, any recent change in color, shape, or size of any moles, especially on the legs, may indicate a cancerous source. It is better to undergo a biopsy of the same to confirm it and proceed further.
text: Yes, any recent change in color, shape, or size of any moles, especially on the legs, may indicate a cancerous source. It is better to undergo a biopsy of the same to confirm it and proceed further.
